CaseStudies.headline: Proven at the Frontier.
CaseStudies.subhead: How the world's most advanced AI labs scale their human evaluation pipelines with NexaWorks.

magic.challenge: Magic is building frontier-scale AI coding models with ultra-long context windows. Standard automated benchmarks like SWE-bench were insufficient to evaluate the complex reasoning and architecture of their agent's repository-level outputs. They needed expert-level qualitative feedback, but managing crowdsourced platforms yielded inconsistent data, and pulling their internal researchers to manually grade outputs was crippling engineering velocity.
magic.solution: NexaWorks deployed a dedicated, fully managed pod of vetted Senior Software Engineers specifically for their evaluation pipeline. This pod was trained to perform rigorous pairwise ranking and logic verification on massive, complex codebases, delivering structured, qualitative 'engineering taste' feedback directly into Magic's RLHF workflow.
magic.outcome: Magic secured a continuous stream of ground-truth code evaluation data without sacrificing a single hour of their core engineering team's time. By replacing decentralized freelancers with a dedicated NexaWorks pod, they achieved a 99% QA acceptance rate on highly complex coding tasks.

FAQ.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subhead: Everything you need to know about NexaWorks.

faqs.question: How do you source domain experts for complex evaluations?
faqs.answer: We maintain a proprietary network of vetted domain experts across fields like law, medicine, coding, and finance. We also run targeted recruitment campaigns for highly specialized requirements.

faqs.question: What is your process for maintaining high inter-annotator agreement?
faqs.answer: We use multi-stage consensus models, regular calibration sessions, and continuous auditing. Ambiguous edge cases are escalated to a senior QA team to maintain strict alignment with your guidelines.

faqs.question: Can you integrate with our existing labeling infrastructure?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our operations teams are tool-agnostic and can work directly within your proprietary infrastructure, or we can deploy our standard enterprise-grade tooling suite.

faqs.question: How do you handle data privacy and security compliance?
faqs.answer: We adhere to strict SOC2, GDPR, and HIPAA compliance standards where required. Our contributor network can operate in secure environments, and we utilize strict data access protocols.

QualityAssurance.headline: Engineered for Accuracy.
QualityAssurance.subhead: Quality is not an afterthought. It is our core operational metric.
QualityAssurance.body: We employ a multi-stage quality assurance protocol that combines reviewer validation, strict acceptance criteria, and continuous contributor auditing to ensure dataset integrity.

WhyNexaWorks.headline: Why leading AI teams choose us.
WhyNexaWorks.body: Building an AI model is difficult. Building the human operations to support it is often harder. NexaWorks removes the operational friction of sourcing, training, and managing human contributors, allowing your engineering teams to focus on the model.

AboutPage.headline: The NexaWorks Manifesto
AboutPage.subhead: We believe that AI models are only as good as the human intelligence that trains them. Our mission is to eliminate the alignment bottleneck by providing rigorous, scalable human data operations.
AboutPage.missionDesc: As context windows expand and AI tackles complex reasoning, standard crowdsourcing platforms fail. Our mission is to bridge this gap by supplying frontier AI labs with highly vetted domain experts and strict consensus-based QA pipelines.
AboutPage.visionDesc: We envision a future where researchers spend 100% of their time on model architecture, not grading data annotators. We manage the operational chaos of human feedback so you can focus on building.

values.title: Uncompromising Quality
values.desc: We reject the gig-economy approach to AI data. We enforce strict inter-annotator agreement logic and senior review escalation to guarantee >99% acceptance rates.

values.title: Domain Expertise First
values.desc: Complex models require complex evaluation. We source specialized talent—from Senior Software Engineers to medical professionals—for highly technical prompting and alignment.

values.title: Seamless Integration
values.desc: We don't force you into new workflows. We integrate directly with your proprietary labeling infrastructure, securely and efficiently, acting as an extension of your team.
